is a practical question — let’s answer it in a way you can deploy. ## The practical deployment path (Lighthouse). If you want a clean, reproducible setup, the most efficient route is the OpenClaw application template on Tencent Cloud Lighthouse. 2. **Select**: Choose **OpenClaw (Clawdbot)** under the **AI Agents** application template. For step-by-step screenshots and the full panel + onboarding flow, use the deployment guide: https://www.tencentcloud.com/techpedia/139184. Even if the template handles day-one setup, you still need a repeatable way to configure models, connect channels, install skills, and keep the gateway alive. # One-time onboarding (interactive) # Keep the agent running as a background service whoami export id. * Installing OpenClaw Skills and practical applications. Deploy one instance, connect one channel, add one skill, and run one workflow for a week. When you are ready to run it 24/7 in a clean, isolated environment, start here again: Tencent Cloud Lighthouse Special Offer. The big wins are boring: repeatable setup, predictable inputs, and clear failure paths.

title: 🦞 From Chat App to AI Powerhouse: Telegram + OpenClaw - Medium
content:
OpenClaw 技术干货

In this guide, we’ll walk through how to install OpenClaw on macOS and connect it to Telegram step by step. OpenClaw is a self-hosted AI assistant that runs locally on your machine while connecting to messaging platforms like Telegram, WhatsApp, Discord, and more. Before connecting OpenClaw to Telegram, we first need to install it locally. After entering your API key, OpenClaw verifies it and automatically configures a default model. ## Step 5: Connect OpenClaw to Telegram. After configuring your model, OpenClaw will ask you to select a chat channel. After selecting **Telegram (Bot API)** as your channel, OpenClaw will prompt you to enter your Telegram bot token. After entering your Telegram bot token, OpenClaw finalizes the channel configuration. After completing the configuration, OpenClaw installs and starts the **Gateway service**. Installing Gateway service....Gateway service installed.Telegram: ok (@yourbotname)Agents: main (default)Heartbeat interval: 30mSession store: ~/.openclaw/agents/main/sessions/sessions.json. Messages sent to your Telegram bot are routed through the OpenClaw Gateway, processed by your selected model, and returned in real time.

title: 🦞 Cron Jobs - OpenClaw
content:
OpenClaw 技术干货

# ​ Cron jobs (Gateway scheduler). openclaw cron run <job-id>. openclaw cron runs --id <job-id>`. ## ​ Tool-call equivalents (Gateway cron tool). ## ​ Where cron jobs are stored. ## ​ Beginner-friendly overview. ## ​ Concepts. ### ​ Jobs. ### ​ Schedules. #### ​ Main session jobs (system events). #### ​ Isolated jobs (dedicated cron sessions). ### ​ Payload shapes (what runs). #### ​ Webhook delivery flow. ### ​ cron.add params. ### ​ cron.update params. ### ​ cron.run and cron.remove params. ## ​ Retry policy. ### ​ Transient errors (retried). ### ​ Permanent errors (no retry). ## ​ Configuration. store: "~/.openclaw/cron/jobs.json",. ## ​ Maintenance. ### ​ Defaults. ### ​ How it works. openclaw cron add --name "Ops sweep" --cron "0 6 * * *" --session isolated --message "Check ops queue" --agent ops. openclaw cron edit <jobId> --agent ops. openclaw cron run <jobId> --due`. `openclaw cron runs --id <jobId>`. `openclaw cron runs --id <jobId> --limit 50`. ## ​ Troubleshooting. ### ​ A recurring job keeps delaying after failures.

title: 🦞 OpenClaw Cron Jobs: 8 Automation Templates, Schedules, and ...
content:
OpenClaw 技术干货

# OpenClaw cron jobs: automate your AI agent while you sleep. * OpenClaw (previously known as Clawdbot and Moltbot) has built-in cron jobs that let your agent run tasks on a schedule without you being present. * What are OpenClaw cron jobs. ## What are OpenClaw cron jobs. Cron jobs are scheduled tasks that your OpenClaw agent executes automatically. An agent with cron jobs runs scheduled tasks at 7 AM, backs up files every hour, and sends weekly reports without manual triggering. Just tell your agent what you want scheduled and it will create the cron job for you. > "Create a cron job that runs every morning at 7 AM UTC. When a cron job runs in the main session, it has access to the full conversation history. For a complete walkthrough of building a morning briefing cron job, see OpenClaw Morning Briefing: 10-Minute Setup That Actually Works. Q: How many cron jobs can I run? * OpenClaw documentation on cron jobs.

title: 🦞 OpenClaw: cron-scheduling - LobeHub
content:
OpenClaw 技术干货

This Skill provides practical guidance to schedule and manage recurring and one-off tasks on Unix-like systems using cron and systemd timers. It explains cron syntax and common schedule patterns, crontab management commands (crontab -e, -l, -r, user crontabs), and shorthand strings like @daily and @reboot. Use it for automated backups, reports, cleanup, deployment hooks, cron-to-systemd migrations, and debugging why jobs didn’t run — improving reliability, observability, and maintainability of scheduled work. Covers cron syntax, crontab management, systemd timers, one-off scheduling, timezone handling, monitoring, and common failure patterns. `@reboot /path/to/script.sh # Run once at startup. 0 2 * * * /opt/scripts/backup.sh >> /var/log/backup.log 2>&1. ExecStart=/opt/scripts/backup.sh. # Set timezone for a specific cron job. ### Why didn't my cron job run? # cron-wrapper.sh — Run a command with logging, timing, and error alerting. # Usage: cron-wrapper.sh <job-name> <command> [args...]. Usage: cron-wrapper.sh <job-name> <command> [args...]}". LOG_DIR="/var/log/cron-jobs". 0 2 * * * /opt/scripts/cron-wrapper.sh daily-backup /opt/scripts/backup.sh. */5 * * * * /opt/scripts/cron-wrapper.sh health-check /opt/scripts/healthcheck.sh`.
